message.content: {"items":[{"title":"German Business Panel – Economic Situation and Expectations in the Corona Crisis 2020","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.21249/DZHW:gpb2020:1.0.0","justification":"Firm-level panel on economic situation, expectations, and consequences of the COVID-19 crisis in Germany around 2020; covers economic conditions and policy responses affecting businesses."},{"title":"ifo Business Survey, 2020-2023","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.7805/ebdc-ifobusiness-2023","justification":"Monthly survey of German firms on business situation, expectations, and constraints in industry, trade, and services; key economic indicators for the 2020s, with sectoral detail on trade and industry."},{"title":"IAB Establishment Panel, 2020","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.5164/IAB.IABBP2004.en.v1","justification":"Representative survey of German establishments on employment, investment, sales, expectations, and business strategies; includes questions on economic conditions and firm management in 2020."},{"title":"IAB Establishment Panel, 2021","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.5164/IAB.IABBP2104.en.v1","justification":"Continuation of the German establishment panel; tracks economic development, policy impact (e.g., subsidies, short‑time work), and business organization in 2021."},{"title":"IAB Establishment Panel, 2022","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.5164/IAB.IABBP2204.en.v1","justification":"Establishment survey for 2022; covers turnover, demand, investment, labor demand, and management practices in German firms, relevant for economic conditions and industrial organization in the 2020s."},{"title":"IAB Establishment Panel, 2023","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.5164/IAB.IABBP2305.de.en.v1","justification":"Latest available wave of the German establishment survey; includes information on current economic situation, expected development, and reactions to economic policy at firm level."},{"title":"IAB Establishment Panel – Corona Supplement 2020","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.5164/IAB.IABBP2009.en.v1","justification":"Special supplement focused on the impact of the COVID‑19 pandemic on German establishments, including changes in turnover, employment, and use of government support schemes."},{"title":"IAB Establishment Panel – Corona Supplement 2021","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.5164/IAB.IABBP2110.en.v1","justification":"Follow‑up supplement on the ongoing effects of the pandemic and associated economic policy measures on firms’ economic situation and organization in Germany."},{"title":"IAB Short-term Labour Market Forecast – Establishment Survey 2020","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.5164/IAB.IABEMP2020.en.v1","justification":"Survey of German establishments used for short‑term labor market forecasting; contains expectations about employment, production, and economic conditions during 2020."},{"title":"IAB Short-term Labour Market Forecast – Establishment Survey 2021","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.5164/IAB.IABEMP2021.en.v1","justification":"Continuation of the forecast‑related establishment survey; captures firms’ assessments of economic conditions, labor demand, and market developments in Germany in 2021."}]}
